dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8293 IH: Abolish the CMMI Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Bean of Florida introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on Ways and Means, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To abolish the Center for Medicare and Medicaid Innovation.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Abolish the CMMI Act.

section.header: Abolishing the Center for Medicare and Medicaid Innovation
section.text: The Center for Medicare and Medicaid Innovation is hereby abolished.
Section 1115A of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1315a) is hereby repealed.
